message:
perf: persistent caches for cleanup prober, embedding queue drain, and retry scheduling

cleanup.rs: introduce CleanupProbeCache with 6-hour retention to avoid
redundant filesystem stats and git-log subprocess spawns on every cleanup
cycle. path_has_recent_activity_cached short-circuits when cache says path
was recently active; git_head_oid_for_workspace skips git log when HEAD
OID hasn't changed. Refactor run_cleanup_cycle into _with_cache variant.

search_embedding_jobs.rs (mcp-agent-mail-db): add next_retry_due_at field
to QueueState tracking the earliest retry-eligible timestamp. drain_batch
now skips the entire O(n) retry-queue scan when no retries are due yet.
drain_batch(0) short-circuits immediately. next_retry_due_at maintained
consistently on enqueue, re-enqueue (dedup update), and drain. New test
queue_drain_batch_zero_is_noop.

embedding_jobs.rs (mcp-agent-mail-search-core): matching next_retry_due_at
optimization in the search-core embedding queue, same pattern as above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
